case_title: DIONNE, PAUL vs. ABIGUZA, DESMOND USI et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIONNE, PAUL AS TO DEFENDANT ABIGUZA, DESMOND USI EKHATOR, LARRY O ALL ROADS TOWING SERVICE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          DEC-24-1992 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-26-1992 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       NOV-24-1992

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF NOV-16-1993, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON NOV-16-1993, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-16-1993 CONTINUED FROM NOV-16-1993 TO DEC-16-1993 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-16-1993, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON DEC-16-1993, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH COURT RULES AND FAILURE TO PAY SANCTIONS. HEARING SET FOR JAN-18-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF DIONNE, PAUL
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF DEC-24-1992, CONTINUED TO JUN-21-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUN-21-1993, CONTINUED TO SEP-20-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 PLTF. MUST GIVE NOTICE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIONNE, PAUL SERVED SEP-15-1993, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ABIGUZA, DESMOND USI
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-20-1993, CONTINUED TO NOV-16-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 PLAINTIFF TO GIVE NOTICE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT EKHATOR, LARRY O ALL ROADS TOWING SERVICE
